Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Hibbs is tempted by a mobster's money when his wife needs surgery to save her eyesight.
Video.title: Who Do You Trust?

Video.summary: A star high-school hockey player and friend of the Scali family - becomes a prime drug-ring suspect.
Video.title: The Puck Stops Here

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate mysterious calls to a reporter about a series of murders.
Video.title: Saturday Night Special

Video.summary: Tony winds up in one of his own jail cells when he runs afoul of an imperious judge.
Video.title: Judgement Day

Video.summary: Commissioner -- and expectant father -- Tony Scali suddenly finds his own life on the line after he infiltrates a New York pornographic teenage film ring.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Video.summary: Tony discovers a family friend working as a prostitute; David is caught pirating cable TV programs.
Video.title: Working Girls

Video.summary: Hunter and Dee get a murder case reopened in order to exonerate a paroled ex-boxer and find the real killer.
Video.title: The Return Of Typhoon Thompson

Video.summary: Tony is enraged as a publicity-seeking "video vigilante" metes out punishment to offenders.
Video.title: Video Vigilante

Video.summary: Tony uncovers the shakedown ofa community of illegal immigrants; David wants an earring to impress a girl.
Video.title: Born In The USA

Video.summary: Paulie's tries to use her son's kidnapping to win back a former girlfriend.
Video.title: Nancy With The Laughing Face

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali, kidnapped and seemingly destined for sudden death, narrowly escapes his fate with the help of an unsuspected ally -- porno movie producer Cyd Palmer.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Video.summary: Reno's surprise reunion with Leeza Bendetti at Bobby's scenic Duck Lake cabin is soured when he stumbles upon a trio of drug dealers and their rolling narcotics lab in the adjoining woods.
Video.title: Rabbit Redux

Video.summary: Reno stirs up more than memories when he heads back to the location of his rookie beat to search for , a reluctant gang banger wanted for murder.
Video.title: South Of 98

Video.summary: Reno tracks Hound Adams, the only man who can clear Reno's name, to a Carlsbad sports bar.
Video.title: Hostage

Video.summary: Lance and Lorenzo look beyond the bedside manner of a young society doctor when he is brutally murdered.
Video.title: Intensive Care

Video.summary: Rita is stunned when her ex, a major league player, is suspected of murdering a club owner.
Video.title: Squeeze Play

Video.summary: Rita and Chris probe a fan who admits to killing the girlfriend of a brash radio star.
Video.title: Shock Jock

Video.summary: A commander kills his wife’s lover, then frames Chris and Rita by manipulating a D.A. and evidence.
Video.title: Witness

Video.summary: Chris is suspended for shooting an unarmed thief as the victim’s mother plots unexpected revenge.
Video.title: Domestic Agenda

Video.summary: Rita takes in a homeless young girl who has witnessed a brutal murder.
Video.title: Lady Luck

Video.summary: Rita and Chris defend Rita’s friend accused of killing her nanny amid her husband’s secret affair.
Video.title: The Sock Drawer

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby travel to the tiny town in New Mexico, on the trail of a bail-jumper to find him being hunted down by a posse for murder.
Video.title: The Posse

Video.summary: Cheyenne convinces a reluctant Bobby to post bail and help prove the innocence of her unrequited love who has been arrested for the murder of his wife, Marily
Video.title: Once Burned, Twice Chey

Video.summary: Reno stumbles into a man-hunt for brothers wanted for armed robbery and the confrontation results in the shooting death of the local sheriff.
Video.title: Sheriff Reno

Video.summary: Bobby and a reluctant Reno head to San Francisco when Bobby is contacted by a Import/Export magnate to find alleged Industrial spy Rikki Yeager.
Video.title: Murderer's Row, Part 1
